query: Palworld 1.0 sanctuary rebalance habitat level cap number new pals variants

mako.raw:
{"query":"Palworld 1.0 sanctuary rebalance habitat level cap number new pals variants","model":"mako","response_time_ms":1021,"verdict":null,"extra_info":null,"results":[{"url":"https://palworld.fandom.com/wiki/Version_1.0","title":"Version 1.0 | Palworld Wiki | Fandom","content":"8 days ago — 1.4 Wildlife Sanctuary Overhaul! 1.5 Rebalanced Pal Habitats; 1.6 Increased Player Level Cap ... 47 new Pals and 25 variant Pals have been added!Read more
This version of Palworld was released on the 10th of July 2026.
- New Settlements Small settlements have been added at the Bamboo Groves, the Snowy Mountains, Sakurajima, and Sunreach.
Note*: For the random Pal spawn mode, to correctly reflect this rebalance, placement data from v0.7.3 and earlier is no longer carried over.
- Added a new animation and effect when picking up a Pal Effigy.
- Enhanced Lily's Spear · An enhanced version of Lily's beloved spear.
- The number of Pal Metal Ingots required to craft an Ultimate Sphere has been reduced from 10 to 5.
We've also added a new sorting option to the Pal Box, allowing Pals to be sorted by Expedition Power.
We've added and adjusted sound effects for building interactions, including structure operation sounds, storage opening/closing sounds, item transfer sounds in chests, crafting completion sounds, repair sounds, Pal Box operation sounds, and Pal cries when assigning Work Pals."},{"url":"https://www.gamespot.com/articles/everything-new-in-palworld-1-0/","title":"Everything New In Palworld 1.0 - New Pals, Mechanics, Tools, And More - GameSpot","content":"4 days ago — Rebalanced Pal Habitats The placement and spawn levels of Pals throughout Palpagos have been reworked. The player level cap has been increased ...
Here, we detail everything new in the full release of Palworld, so you can see it all at a glance.
The player level cap has been increased from 65 to 80.
Wild Red Berry plants are now easier to spot, and there are more at the Sea Breeze Archipelago, Marsh Island, Eastern Wild Island, and Isle of Silence.
Continuous, story-driven sub-missions have been added alongside new NPCs and Journals that teach more about Palworld and Palpagos.
There are now 10 levels of work suitability for Pals, and they’ve all been rebalanced.
Reaching the maximum rank will still increase all of the Pal’s work suitability levels.
The Applied Ranching Handbook will raise the work suitability level of ranching.
The number of captures required to complete a capture bonus is now five, down from 12.
The elemental damage bonus effects of Divine Heaven, Flame Emperor, Sea Emperor, Thunder Emperor, Spirit King, Ice Emperor, Earth Emperor, King of the Underworld, and Divine Dragon have been increased."},{"url":"https://www.thebiglead.com/palworld-1-0-patch-notes/","title":"Palworld 1.0 patch notes: Everything new in the official launch","content":"On that note, the number of Pals required to reach the max rank has been decreased from 116 to just 48, so you can max out your Pals a lot easier.","date":"8 days ago"},{"url":"https://www.videogameschronicle.com/guide/palworld-1-0-patch-notes-9-biggest-changes/","title":"Palworld 1.0 patch notes: 9 biggest changes | VGC","content":"8 days ago — Palworld 1.0 patch notes: 9 biggest changes ; Increased level cap · New areas ; 72 new Pals · Improved Tower Bosses ; New everything · Pal Awakenings ...Read more
Palworld 1.0 is by far the biggest patch to ever happen to the game, and there are more massive changes than you can shake a Pal at.
Palworld has reworked almost every major mechanic in both major and minor ways, added brand new areas, new Pals, increased the level cap, added new ways to increase the strength of your character and Pals — and that really is just the beginning.
Players can now level up all the way to level 80, and a huge variety of new unlockable technologies have been added too.
Full Palworld 1.0 patch notes"},{"url":"https://minestrator.com/blog/post/palworld-10-is-out-patch-notes-breakdown-and-what-changes-for-your-server","title":"Palworld 1.0 Patch Notes: Full July 10 Recap | MineStrator","content":"72 new Pals and a level cap raised to 80
Server Clustering, announced in June 2026 during the 1.0 reveal, does not appear in the official patch notes published on July 10, and no official configuration is documented at launch."}]}

Palworld 1.0 is live with 72 new Pals, a sky island zone, story rework, and a breeding mutation system. Pocketpair has overhauled the story, added an entirely new sky zone, introduced 72 new Pals, and rebuilt core systems like sanctuaries and breeding. ## What's actually new in Palworld 1.0? The full version brings new zones, a reworked main story, expanded Pal mechanics, and quality-of-life changes across the board. It's a set of floating islands sitting above Palpagos, and it brings its own ores, exclusive Pals, and content that you won't find anywhere else on the ground. Think of it as the game's answer to what happens after you've seen most of the base map. ## How many new Pals are in Palworld 1.0? **72 new Pals** have been added in 1.0, along with several new variants. ## What's the player level cap in Palworld 1.0?","score":0.82795376,"raw_content":null},{"url":"https://www.gamesradar.com/games/survival/the-palworld-1-0-patch-notes-are-monstrous-72-new-pals-level-cap-of-85-rebalanced-combat-a-reworked-story-world-overhaul-and-so-much-more","title":"The Palworld 1.0 patch notes are monstrous: 72 new Pals, level cap of 85, rebalanced combat, a reworked story, world overhaul, and so much more | GamesRadar+","content":"Enter your email below and we'll send confirmation, and sign you up to our newsletter. New version of the game brings an insane amount of new content and reworks: new locations, new mechanics, 72 new Pals, reworked main story flow, Awakening, Mutations, large-scale overhauls and much-much more! Another aspect that makes the new 1.0 update so exciting, is that it’s a new step forwards for the game in general, as the game is no longer in early access. New update brough a significant expansion to the world of the game. Palpagos Island received a few new, large locations, including the ones, that have been peaking players interest since the launch of the game. The heart of the Palworld is now open and ready to be discovered by the players. It’s a completely, new location with its own ancient civilization, exclusive new Pals, tower bosses and unique materials that can be gathered with a special equipment.","score":0.60386235,"raw_content":null},{"url":"https://www.thebiglead.com/palworld-1-0-patch-notes","title":"Palworld 1.0 patch notes: Everything new in the official ...","content":"If you’ve been playing Palworld throughout its early access, then it’s highly recommended that you start a fresh playthrough for this update, as it’s going to be a significantly different experience to start from scratch. Whether you’re one of those players starting fresh or a brand new one who’s hopped onto the bandwagon for this finally complete experience, here’s a summary of everything that’s new/changed in Palworld 1.0. In this case, a whopping total of 72 new Pals have been added to the game. You’ll find the majority of them roaming the new areas added in this update (more on those shortly), but some have been added to the existing areas too; you’ll have to go out and explore to find them all!
